titleStmt.title: SII 8.41: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 41. (A.R. No. 454-A of 1902). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . rājātirājade varkku yāṇṭu 10 1
vatu ceyyūr tevarkaṇṭan
tāṅkuvānāna Uttamacoḻavaḷava
taraiyanpakkal yikkoyilil śivabrā
hma ṇar kaṭampan tāṅkuvānum kam
pan Uyyavantānum yipperiyatiru
vācal cuvarum tiṇṇaiyum yiṭṭukka
ṭṭi meyppoliyūṭṭākak koṇṭa
paḻaṅkācu Onṟe kāle munṟumā mu
kkāṇiyum 1kha�tma yum koṇ
ṭu can=ti rādi ttavarai celuttakkaṭa
vom yivviruvom . palmā
heśva ra rakṣai . meṟpiṭipāṭu meṟpaṭi śivabrā
hma ṇaṉ(p) puṟṟiṭaṅkkoṇṭār koyilil viśveśva rade varrkkum mallikā
caṉade varkkum kāttikai viḷakkukkum poliyūṭṭāka nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa
paḻaṅkācu I Araikku Āṭṭup poliyun tirama mukkālum ko
ṇṭu candrādi ttavarai celuttakkaṭavom . panmāheśva
ra rakṣai .Below this inscription are engraved the following lines:— 1 meṟpaṭiyārpakkal yikkoyiliṟ kāṇiuṭaiya śivabrāhma ṇar tāṅkuv[ān] mahā- de vanenum kampan uyyavantānum 2 yidde va[r*]kku samgra [mam] neyyāṭi amutuceyyap poliyūṭṭāka koṇṭa anṟāṭu naṟputukkācu nālu nālukku āṭṭup poliyum [ci]nna m āṟu āṟu koṇṭu candrādi ttava- 3 rai celu[ttakkaṭavo]m panm[ āheśva] ra rakṣai . 1 meṟpaṭiyāl ceyyūrum yivvūr koyilkaḷilum kāṇiuṭaiya pāracivan aiyā[ṟa]n uttan=te n aippacip paraṇiyum meṟpaṭi nāḷ 10 2- l tirukkātti••• nāḷ iraṇṭukku nāyakar naga rapradakṣi ṇam eḻun=ta ruḷap poliyūṭṭākak koṇṭu koṭiyūr putu- 2 kācu• āṟu koṇṭu candrādi ttavarai uttanu[m*] uttanāyanum celuttakkaṭavom pāracivan oṟṟi••••• yikkoyilil śivabrāhma ṇarom pāracivanukku meṟpaṭiyārpakkal koṇṭa nāḷ iraṇṭināl vanta kācākkit tiruvirun=tu nāḷiraṇṭilu kṣetra pālade varai pū 3 meṟpaṭiyānpakkal kampan uyyavantānen oru pacuvukku nittam oru••. 4 nirvārkkap poliyūṭṭākak koṇṭa kāciraṇṭuṅ koṇṭu candrādi ttavarai celuttakkaṭavom
Digital edition of SII 8.41 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
